title: Splitting 96 Well Plates for gDNA Extraction and Continuing Culture
author: Celeste M M. Karch

steps_raw.instruction: Coat 96 well plate with 50 µL Matrigel per well.
Prepare plate for expansion by aspirating Matrigel from plate.
Add 50 µL mTesR1 + 10 uM Rock Inhibitor to appropriate wells.
Wash with 200 µL PBS and aspirate.
Tap to lift cells from plate.
Check under microscope to ensure that cells have detached from plate.
Add 50 µL FBS and tap to mix.
Transfer 50 µL to 96 well PCR plate, while maintaining the location of each sample (this plate will be used for gDNA extraction).
Transfer remaining cells (~30uL) to 96 well plate containing mTesR1.
After 24:00:00 , complete daily media changes with mTesR1.
